heroSubtitle: Connect Claude Code to Feishu, Slack, Discord and Telegram in minutes. No server framework required.
platformsSubtitle: One tool, every major messaging platform.
featuresSubtitle: Powerful features built in. Zero configuration hell.
feature1Desc: Send and receive messages on Feishu, Slack, Discord, and Telegram. Smart auto-formatting detects Markdown and long messages are split automatically.
feature2Desc: Built-in message queue handles concurrent requests gracefully. Timeout protection and PM2 process management keep your bot online 24/7.
feature3Desc: Full context-aware conversations with session persistence. Switch models on the fly, track costs, and control execution with slash commands.
feature4Desc: Works with Claude OAuth login or API Key mode. Interactive setup wizard runs on first launch — no manual JSON editing required.
feature5Desc: Runtime model switching via /model, session cost tracking via /cost, and prompt logging control for privacy in shared environments.
step1Description:
1. Visit open.feishu.cn to create an application
2. Enable "Bot" capability in the app
3. Go to "Events & Callbacks", select "Long Connection" mode, add event: im.message.receive_v1
4. Go to "Permission Management", enable permissions (or import via JSON below)
5. Publish the app version and note down App ID and App Secret
step2Description: CCBot supports OAuth login (run `claude login`) or API Key mode. OAuth requires no extra config. For API Key, edit ~/.claude/settings.json
step3Description: Navigate to your project directory, install and start ccbot. First run will prompt you to fill in the configuration
step3Code:
# Install via npm
npm install -g @ccbot/cli

# Navigate to your project directory and start ccbot
cd /path/to/your/project
ccbot start

# First run will prompt:
# ? Claude Code path: claude
# ? Feishu App ID: cli_xxx
# ? Feishu App Secret: ***
# ? Timeout in ms: 3600000

# Config saved to ccbot.json
step4Description: Chat with Claude Code directly in your Feishu, Slack, Discord or Telegram group. Mention the bot to start a conversation
footer: Built with ❤️ for developers | Open Source on GitHub
